resources.string: IntentLock intercepts phone unlocks and predicts your next app using AI, helping you stay focused.
IntentLock shows a prediction overlay when you unlock your phone. Tap Grant, then enable IntentLock in the list.
IntentLock detects unlocks using Android\'s Accessibility Service. Tap Grant, find IntentLock, and toggle it on.
IntentLock reads your recent app usage to improve predictions. Tap Grant, find IntentLock, and enable it.
IntentLock is now active. Lock your phone and unlock it to see the prediction overlay.
